query: ALTER TABLE `books` ADD COLUMN `pdfFileKey` varchar(512) DEFAULT NULL; ALTER TABLE `books` ADD COLUMN `pdfFileName` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL; ALTER TABLE `books` DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS `stripePriceId`; ALTER TABLE `books` DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS `stripeProductId`;
